name: The Tobacconist's Manual
landing_text: This manual covers the full tobacconist's craft: growing tobacco, curing leaves, fermenting and aging them, cutting them for use, and crafting finished smoking products.$(br2)Good tobacco is not made in one step. It is grown well, cured correctly, handled carefully, and processed with skill.
subtitle: Growing, Curing, Aging, and Crafting
